title: Pinned memory server via docker image is SAFE

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers (src/memory/README.md (Docker)). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: A memory server run from a pinned docker image with a named volume exposes no host paths, no credentials, and no shell, so it should not alarm the user.
knownLimitations: Static analysis cannot prove the image tag will not be re-pushed to point at different code.
